description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a bold yellow exterior accented by metallic silver stripes running along the hood and roof. The car features a sharply angled front with a wide windshield and a distinctive, aggressive nose, complemented by blacked-out headlamps and a visible crack in the windshield. Its side profile reveals a streamlined, aerodynamic body with pronounced wheel arches, black five-spoke rims, and a set of three metallic fins on each front fender. The rear is characterized by a large, circular exhaust and a subtle integrated spoiler, with taillights set into the angular rear fascia. The windows are tinted dark, and the car sits low to the ground, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. The overall appearance suggests a modern, high-performance vehicle built for speed and agility in urban environments.
description: A yellow, low-slung sports car with silver racing stripes, black five-spoke wheels, and a streamlined, aggressive design. Features include a cracked windshield, metallic side fins, and a prominent rear exhaust.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide back, large circular exhaust, subtle integrated spoiler, and silver stripes running over the trunk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the aerodynamic profile, three metallic side fins, black five-spoke wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sharply angled nose, cracked windshield, blacked-out headlamps, and silver stripes on the hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined body, side fins, black wheels, and the car's low stance.
